channel.title: American Mineralogist
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in American Mineralogist

item.title: Gender in mineral names
item.description: Article by Matthew J. Kohn DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2024-9327

item.title: Role of impurities in the semiconducting properties of natural pyrite: Implications for the electrochemical accumulation of visible gold and formation of hydrothermal gold deposits
item.description: Article by Matthew J. Kohn DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9187

item.title: Unraveling clay-mineral genesis and climate change on Earth and Mars using machine learning-based VNIR spectral modeling
item.description: Article by Matthew J. Kohn DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9299

item.title: Characteristics of the distribution of minerals among the space groups
item.description: Article by Matthew J. Kohn DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2024-9381

item.title: Al3+ and H+ substitutions in TiO2 polymorphs: Structural and vibrational investigations
item.description: Article by Matthew J. Kohn DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2024-9316

item.title: Oriented triphylite rods in apatite from an LCT pegmatite in the Stankuvatske Li-ore deposit, Ukraine: Implications for Li mobility
item.description: Article by Matthew J. Kohn DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9172

item.title: Quartz textures, trace elements, fluid inclusions, and in situ oxygen isotopes from Aktogai porphyry Cu deposit, Kazakhstan
item.description: Article by Matthew J. Kohn DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-8931

item.title: Cu nanoparticle geometry as the key to bicolor behavior in Oregon sunstones: An application of LSPR theory in nanomineralogy
item.description: Article by Matthew J. Kohn DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9141

item.title: Gowerite, Ca[B5O8(OH)][B(OH)3]·3H2O: Revisiting the crystal structure and exploring its formation context
item.description: Article by Matthew J. Kohn DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2024-9367

item.title: Zhonghongite, Cu29(As, Sb)12S33, a new mineral from the high-sulfidation vein of Jiama porphyry system, Tibet, China
item.description: Article by Matthew J. Kohn DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2024-9338

item.title: Uramphite, (NH4)(UO2)(PO4)·3H2O, from the second world occurrence, Beshtau uranium deposit, Northern Caucasus, Russia: Crystal-structure refinement, infrared spectroscopy, and relation to uramarsite
item.description: Article by Matthew J. Kohn DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2024-9313

item.title: A simple method to create mineral mounts in thin section for teaching optical mineralogy
item.description: Article by Matthew J. Kohn DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9285
